recommendations.title: My Sassy Girl
recommendations.overview: A guy has his life planned out until he is wooed, groomed and then dumped by an elusive woman.

recommendations.title: War of the Buttons
recommendations.overview: 1960. The thrilling battles waged by a band of kids from two rival villages in the southern French countryside.

recommendations.overview: After 500 years, castle ghost Hui Buh finally has some royal residents to haunt, but he soon loses his license to scare and must get recertified.

recommendations.title: Beetlejuice
recommendations.overview: A newly dead New England couple seeks help from a deranged demon exorcist to scare an affluent New York family out of their home.

recommendations.title: Beauty and the Beast

recommendations.title: Pocahontas
recommendations.overview: Pocahontas, daughter of a Native American tribe chief, falls in love with an English soldier as colonists invade 17th century Virginia.

recommendations.title: The Lion in Winter
recommendations.overview: Henry II and his estranged queen, Eleanor of Aquitaine, battle over the choice of an heir.
